_note: Per-lesson role-play scenario. Grounded in Pre-A1/023 dialogue + vocab. Learner plays Mia; computer plays Leo. Each NPC node offers 2-3 branches so the same lesson language can be reached different ways. Consumed by RP.Engine + RP.classifiers.local (see roleplay/).
title: 023 · The Kite

routes.meaning: Mia says the kite is red and big.
examples: It is a big red kite.
routes.hint: Describe the kite: “It is red and big.”

routes.meaning: Mia reacts to the cool kite.
routes.hint: You can describe it — “It is red and big.” — or say “Wow, a kite!”

partial.message: Tell Leo about his kite: “It is red and big.”

off_topic.message: Leo has a kite. Say “It is red and big.”

npc.text: Thank you! It is red and big.

routes.hint: Agree with Leo: “Yes, it is big!”

partial.message: The kite is red and big. Say “Yes, it is big!”

off_topic.message: Leo's kite is red and big. Say “Yes, it is big!”

routes.meaning: Mia says the kite flies high.
routes.hint: Say what the kite does: “Your kite flies high!”

routes.meaning: Mia talks about the strong wind.
routes.hint: You can say “Your kite flies high!” or “The wind is strong!”

partial.message: The wind is strong. Say “Your kite flies high!”

off_topic.message: It is windy today. Say “Your kite flies high!”

npc.text: It goes up in the sky.

routes.meaning: Mia asks to hold the kite.
Mia says the kite is high in the sky.
routes.hint: You can ask “Can I hold it?” or say “It is so high!”

partial.message: Do you want a turn? Ask “Can I hold it?”

off_topic.message: The kite is up in the sky. Ask “Can I hold it?”

routes.meaning: Mia says this is so much fun.
routes.hint: Say how you feel: “This is so much fun!”
You can say “This is so much fun!” or “I have the string!”

partial.message: How is it? Say “This is so much fun!”

off_topic.message: You hold the string now. Say “This is so much fun!”

routes.hint: Say how you feel: “I love kites!”

routes.meaning: Mia agrees to fly it together.
routes.hint: You can say “I love kites!” or “Yes, together!”

partial.message: Fly it with Leo. Say “I love kites!”

off_topic.message: Leo wants to fly it together. Say “I love kites!”

npc.text: Our kite flies high in the sky. So much fun!
